task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows 'http://localhost:8080/CompanyAllHands' and the Jitsi Meet main meeting interface is visible.

task_completion.description: The agent opened the Settings dialog and navigated to the moderator controls.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Settings modal is open on the screen, displaying moderator options such as 'Everyone starts muted', 'Everyone starts hidden', and 'Follow me' (typically under the 'More' tab).

task_completion.description: The 'Everyone starts muted' setting is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox or toggle switch next to 'Everyone starts muted' is checked or turned on.

task_completion.description: The 'Everyone starts hidden' setting is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox or toggle switch next to 'Everyone starts hidden' is checked or turned on.

task_completion.description: The 'Follow me' or 'Everyone follows me' setting is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox or toggle switch next to 'Follow me' or 'Everyone follows me' is checked or turned on.

task_completion.description: The agent remains in the meeting room after completing the configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final screenshot shows the Jitsi Meet interface for the 'CompanyAllHands' meeting, indicating the agent has not left or closed the meeting.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to access the meeting.
integrity.visual_evidence: A standard web browser (like Firefox or Chromium) is visible, navigating to the Jitsi URL, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Jitsi Meet GUI to change settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Jitsi Meet Settings dialog being opened and toggles being clicked, rather than API requests being sent via terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Jitsi meeting URL is http://localhost:8080/CompanyAllHands. The required moderator settings are typically found in the Settings dialog under the 'More' tab. The exact text for the toggles are 'Everyone starts muted', 'Everyone starts hidden', and 'Follow me' (or 'Everyone follows me'). The agent must enable all three and remain in the meeting room.
